title: phlegmariurus vernicosus
intro: Phlegmariurus vernicosus, also known as the yellow spleenwort, is a species of climbing fern native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus vernicosus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, with some herbal practitioners also using it in tinctures and capsules.
